subcodes.first_line: Observe thou the grace and bounty of God, and ponder thereon, that perchance thou mayest become aware of a drop from the ocean of generosity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ملاحظه کن فضل و عنایت الهی را و در آن تفکر نما که شاید برشحی از بحر کرم مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @consolation and comfort, @poems and quotation from poetry, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
